title: Towards a Four Power Agreement For a 'New Paradigm' of Development: Panel One
description: Helga Zepp-LaRouche keynotes the conference providing her unique insight into the dynamic fight between the "New Silk Road Spirit" sweeping the globe typified by the recent India and Pakistan developments, or at the summits between the U.S., the Republic of Korea and the DPRK, versus the adherents of the Old Paradigm of geopolitics that continue to foment conflict.  Jason Ross follows next, proving China's massive investment into infrastructure into the nations of Africa is truly beneficial for both parties.  The conference firmly establishes the capability to avert tragedy in this momentous occasion in human history and create a 'New Paradigm' in human relations.

chapters.title: Africa has the largest development potential
China and Africa work together towards prosperity
